class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConfigurationEvent.ChangedAsset

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConfigurationEvent.ChangedDocument

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConfigurationEvent.ChangedServiceCategory

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConfigurationEvent.ChangedUsagePoint

Used to report details on creation, change or deletion of an entity or

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.issuerID
documentation: Unique identifier of the business entity originating an end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.issuerTrackingID

Identifier assigned by the initiator (e.g. retail electric provider) of
an end device control action to uniquely identify the demand response event,
text message, or other subject of the control action. Can be used when
cancelling an event or text message request or to identify the originating

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.userID

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.EndDevice

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.EndDeviceEventDetails

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.EndDeviceEventType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.MeterReading

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEvent.UsagePoint

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.alertType

The type of the issued alert which is drawn from the specified alert type
list.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.cancelledDateTime
documentation:
Time and date alert cancelled. Used only if alert is cancelled before it

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.headline
documentation:
An abbreviated textual description of the alert issued.
Note: the full text of the alert appears in the .description attribute
(inherited from IdentifiedObject).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.AlertTypeList
documentation: The list of alert types from which the type of this alert is drawn.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.EnvironmentalDataProvider
documentation: Environmental data provider for this alert.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.EnvironmentalLocationKind
documentation: Type of location to which this environmental alert applies.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalAlert.inEffect
documentation: The interval for which this weather alert is in effect.
An environmental alert issued by a provider or system.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AlertTypeList

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AlertTypeList.version
documentation: The version of the named list of alert types.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AlertTypeList.EnvironmentalAlert
documentation: An alert whose type is drawn from this alert type list.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AlertTypeList.EnvironmentalDataAuthority
documentation:
The environmental data authority responsible for publishing this list of
alert types.

A named list of alert types.
Note: the name of the list is reflected in the .name attribute (inherited
from IdentifiedObject).

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalyticScore

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalyticScore.calculationDateTime
documentation: Timestamp of when the score was calculated.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalyticScore.effectiveDateTime
documentation: Date-time for when the score applies.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalyticScore.value
documentation: Asset health score value.

An indicative scoring by an analytic that can be used to characterize the
health of or the risk associated with one or more assets. The analytic
score reflects the results of an execution of an analytic against an asset
or group of assets.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AggregateScore
documentation:
An aggregated indicative scoring by an analytic, which is based on other
analytic scores, that can be used to characterize the health of or the
risk associated with one or more assets.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Appointment

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Appointment.callAhead
documentation:
True if requested to call customer when someone is about to arrive at their
premises.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Appointment.meetingInterval
documentation: Date and time reserved for appointment.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Appointment.Persons
documentation: All persons for this appointment.
Meeting time and location.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.ActivityRecords
documentation: All activity records created for this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.AssetContainer
documentation: Container of this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.AssetDeployment
documentation: This asset's deployment.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.AssetInfo
documentation: Data applicable to this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.BreakerOperation
documentation: Breaker operation information for this breaker.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.ConfigurationEvents
documentation: All configuration events created for this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.Location
documentation: Location of this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.OrganisationRoles
documentation: All roles an organisation plays for this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.Ownerships
documentation: All ownerships of this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.PowerSystemResources
documentation:
All power system resources used to electrically model this asset. For example,
transformer asset is electrically modelled with a transformer and its windings
and tap changer.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.ProcedureDataSet
documentation: Procedure data set that applies to this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.Procedures
documentation: All procedures applicable to this asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Asset.ProductAssetModel
documentation: The model of this asset.

Tangible resource of the utility, including power system equipment, various
end devices, cabinets, buildings, etc. For electrical network equipment,
the role of the asset is defined through PowerSystemResource and its subclasses,
defined mainly in the Wires model (refer to IEC61970-301 and model package
IEC61970::Wires). Asset description places emphasis on the physical characteristics
of the equipment fulfilling that role.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetContainer

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetContainer.Assets
documentation: All assets within this container asset.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetContainer.Seals
documentation: All seals applied to this asset container.

Asset that is aggregation of other assets such as conductors, transformers,
switchgear, land, fences, buildings, equipment, vehicles, etc.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DuctBank

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DuctBank.circuitCount
documentation:
Number of circuits in duct bank. Refer to associations between a duct (ConductorAsset)
and an ACLineSegment to understand which circuits are in which ducts.

A duct contains individual wires in the layout as specified with associated
wire spacing instances; number of them gives the number of conductors in
this duct.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDevice

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDevice.amrSystem

Automated meter reading (AMR) or other communication system responsible
for communications to this end device.

documentation: Usage point to which this end device belongs.

Asset container that performs one or more end device functions. One type
of end device is a meter which can perform metering, load management, connect/disconnect,
accounting functions, etc. Some end devices, such as ones monitoring and
controlling air conditioners, refrigerators, pool pumps may be connected
to a meter. All end devices may have communication capability defined by
the associated communication function(s). An end device may be owned by
a consumer, a service provider, utility or otherwise.
There may be a related end device function that identifies a sensor or
control point within a metering application or communications systems (e.g.,
water, gas, electricity).
Some devices may use an optical port that conforms to the ANSI C12.18 standard
for communications.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InterrupterUnit

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InterrupterUnit.Bushing
documentation:
Bushing(s) to which the fixed contact(s) of this interrupter is(are) attached.
Some interrupters have one fixed and one moving contact, some have 2 fixed
contacts, some 2 moving contacts. An interrupter will have relationships
with 2 bushings and those relationships may be any combination of the FixedContact
and MovingContact associations.

Some interrupters have one fixed and one moving contact, some have 2 fixed
contacts, some 2 moving contacts. An interrupter will have relationships
with 2 bushings and those relationships may be any combination of the FixedContact
and MovingContact associations.

Winding phase angle where 360 degrees are represented with clock hours,
so the valid values are {0, ..., 11}. For example, to express the second
winding in code 'Dyn11', set attributes as follows: 'endNumber'=2, 'connectionKind'
= Yn and 'phaseAngleClock' = 11.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.insulationThickness
documentation: (if insulated conductor) Thickness of the insulation.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.material
documentation: Conductor material.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.rAC25
documentation: AC resistance per unit length of the conductor at 25 °C.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.rAC50
documentation: AC resistance per unit length of the conductor at 50 °C.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.rAC75
documentation: AC resistance per unit length of the conductor at 75 °C.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.radius
documentation: Outside radius of the wire.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.ratedCurrent
documentation: Current carrying capacity of the wire under stated thermal conditions.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireInfo.rDC20
documentation: DC resistance per unit length of the conductor at 20 °C.

Wire data that can be specified per line segment phase, or for the line
segment as a whole in case its phases all have the same wire characteristics.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.isStrandFill
documentation: True if wire strands are extruded in a way to fill the voids in the cable.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.sheathAsNeutral
documentation: True if sheath / shield is used as a neutral (i.e., bonded).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.constructionKind
documentation: Kind of construction of this cable.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.diameterOverCore
documentation:
Diameter over the core, including any semi-con screen; should be the insulating
layer's inside diameter.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.diameterOverInsulation
documentation: Diameter over the insulating layer, excluding outer screen.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.diameterOverJacket
documentation: Diameter over the outermost jacketing layer.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.diameterOverScreen
documentation: Diameter over the outer screen; should be the shield's inside diameter.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.nominalTemperature
documentation: Maximum nominal design operating temperature.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.outerJacketKind
documentation: Kind of outer jacket of this cable.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CableInfo.shieldMaterial
documentation: Material of the shield.
Cable data.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo.neutralStrandCount
documentation: Number of concentric neutral strands.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo.diameterOverNeutral
documentation: Diameter over the concentric neutral strands.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo.neutralStrandGmr
documentation: Geometric mean radius of the neutral strand.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo.neutralStrandRadius
documentation: Outside radius of the neutral strand.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConcentricNeutralCableInfo.neutralStrandRDC20
documentation: DC resistance per unit length of the neutral strand at 20 °C.
Concentric neutral cable data.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TapeShieldCableInfo

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TapeShieldCableInfo.tapeLap
documentation:
Percentage of the tape shield width that overlaps in each wrap, typically
10% to 25%.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TapeShieldCableInfo.tapeThickness
documentation: Thickness of the tape shield, before wrapping.
Tape shield cable data.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.OverheadWireInfo
documentation: Overhead wire data.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo.isCable
documentation: If true, this spacing data describes a cable.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo.phaseWireCount
documentation:
Number of wire sub-conductors in the symmetrical bundle (typically between
1 and 4).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo.phaseWireSpacing
documentation: Distance between wire sub-conductors in a symmetrical bundle.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo.usage
documentation: Usage of the associated wires.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.WireSpacingInfo.WirePositions
documentation: All positions of single wires (phase or neutral) making the conductor.

Wire spacing data that associates multiple wire positions with the line
segment, and allows to calculate line segment impedances. Number of phases
can be derived from the number of associated wire positions whose phase
is not neutral.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetLocationHazard

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetLocationHazard.kind
documentation: Kind of hazard.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetLocationHazard.Locations
documentation: The location of this hazard.

Potential hazard related to the location of an asset. Examples are trees
growing under overhead power lines, a park being located by a substation
(i.e., children climb fence to recover a ball), a lake near an overhead
distribution line (fishing pole/line contacting power lines), dangerous
neighbour, etc.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseFrequency

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseFrequency.frequency
documentation: The base frequency.

The class describe a base frequency for a power system network. In case
of multiple power networks with different frequencies, e.g. 50 or 60 Hertz
each network will have it's own base frequency class. Hence it is assumed
that power system objects having different base frequencies appear in separate
documents where each document has a single base frequency instance.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasePower

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasePower.basePower
documentation: Value used as base power.
The BasePower class defines the base power used in the per unit calculations.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage
documentation: The power system resource's base voltage.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.ConductingEquipment
documentation:
All conducting equipment with this base voltage. Use only when there is
no voltage level container used and only one base voltage applies. For
example, not used for transformers.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.NetworkAssetDeployment
documentation: A network asset deployment at this base voltage level.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.TopologicalNode
documentation: The topological nodes at the base voltage.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.TransformerEnds
documentation: Transformer ends at the base voltage. This is essential for PU calculation.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BaseVoltage.VoltageLevel
documentation: The voltage levels having this base voltage.
Defines a system base voltage which is referenced.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule.startTime
documentation:
The time for the first time point. The value can be a time of day, not
a specific date.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule.value1Multiplier
documentation: Multiplier for value1.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule.value1Unit
documentation: Value1 units of measure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule.value2Multiplier
documentation: Multiplier for value2.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BasicIntervalSchedule.value2Unit
documentation: Value2 units of measure.
Schedule of values at points in time.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IrregularIntervalSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IrregularIntervalSchedule.TimePoints
documentation: The point data values that define a curve.
The schedule has time points where the time between them varies.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegularIntervalSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegularIntervalSchedule.endTime
documentation:
The time for the last time point. The value can be a time of day, not a
specific date.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegularIntervalSchedule.timeStep
documentation:
The time between each pair of subsequent regular time points in sequence
order.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegularIntervalSchedule.TimePoints
documentation: The regular interval time point data values that define this schedule.
The schedule has time points where the time between them is constant.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GenUnitOpSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GenUnitOpSchedule.GeneratingUnit
documentation:
A generating unit may have an operating schedule, indicating the planned
operation of the unit.

The generating unit's Operator-approved current operating schedule (or
plan), typically produced with the aid of unit commitment type analyses.
The X-axis represents absolute time. The Y1-axis represents the status
(0=off-line and unavailable: 1=available: 2=must run: 3=must run at fixed
power value: etc.). The Y2-axis represents the must run fixed power value
where required.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HydroPumpOpSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HydroPumpOpSchedule.HydroPump
documentation:
The hydro pump has a pumping schedule over time, indicating when pumping
is to occur.

The hydro pump's Operator-approved current operating schedule (or plan),
typically produced with the aid of unit commitment type analyses.The unit's
operating schedule status is typically given as: (0=unavailable) (1=avilable
to startup or shutdown) (2=must pump).

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InflowForecast

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InflowForecast.Reservoir
documentation: A reservoir may have a "natural" inflow forecast.

Natural water inflow to a reservoir, usually forecasted from predicted
rain and snowmelt. Typically in one hour increments for up to 10 days.
The forecast is given in average cubic meters per second over the time
increment.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SeasonDayTypeSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SeasonDayTypeSchedule.DayType
documentation: DayType for the Schedule.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SeasonDayTypeSchedule.Season
documentation: Season for the Schedule.

A time schedule covering a 24 hour period, with curve data for a specific
type of season and day.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConformLoadSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConformLoadSchedule.ConformLoadGroup
documentation: The ConformLoadGroup where the ConformLoadSchedule belongs.

A curve of load versus time (X-axis) showing the active power values (Y1-axis)
and reactive power (Y2-axis) for each unit of the period covered. This
curve represents a typical pattern of load over the time period for a given
day type and season.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.NonConformLoadSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.NonConformLoadSchedule.NonConformLoadGroup
documentation: The NonConformLoadGroup where the NonConformLoadSchedule belongs.

An active power (Y1-axis) and reactive power (Y2-axis) schedule (curves)
versus time (X-axis) for non-conforming loads, e.g., large industrial load
or power station service (where modeled).

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegulationSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegulationSchedule.RegulatingControl
documentation: Regulating controls that have this Schedule.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RegulationSchedule.VoltageControlZones
documentation: A VoltageControlZone may have a voltage regulation schedule.

A pre-established pattern over time for a controlled variable, e.g., busbar
voltage.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SwitchSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SwitchSchedule.Switch
documentation: A SwitchSchedule is associated with a Switch.

A schedule of switch positions. If RegularTimePoint.value1 is 0, the switch
is open. If 1, the switch is closed.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TapSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TapSchedule.TapChanger
documentation: A TapSchedule is associated with a TapChanger.
A pre-established pattern over time for a tap step.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SteamSendoutSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SteamSendoutSchedule.CogenerationPlant
documentation: A cogeneration plant has a steam sendout schedule.
The cogeneration plant's steam sendout schedule in volume per time unit.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.monitorActivePower
documentation: Monitor the active power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.monitorReactivePower
documentation: Monitor the reactive power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.maximumActivePower
documentation: The maximum active power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.maximumReactivePower
documentation: The maximum reactive power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.minimumActivePower
documentation: The minimum active power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.minimumReactivePower
documentation: The minimum reactive power flow.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BranchGroup.BranchGroupTerminal
documentation: The directed branch group terminals to be summed.

A group of branch terminals whose directed flow summation is to be monitored.
A branch group need not form a cutset of the network.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BusNameMarker

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BusNameMarker.priority
documentation:
Priority of bus name marker for use as topology bus name. Use 0 for don
t care. Use 1 for highest priority. Use 2 as priority is less than 1 and
so on.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BusNameMarker.ReportingGroup
documentation: The reporting group to which this bus name marker belongs.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BusNameMarker.Terminal
documentation: The terminals associated with this bus name marker.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.BusNameMarker.TopologicalNode
documentation:
A user defined topological node that was originally defined in a planning
model not yet having topology described by ConnectivityNodes. Once ConnectivityNodes
has been created they may linked to user defined ToplogicalNdes using BusNameMarkers.

Used to apply user standard names to topology buses. Typically used for
"bus/branch" case generation. Associated with one or more terminals that
are normally connected with the bus name. The associated terminals are
normally connected by non-retained switches. For a ring bus station configuration,
all busbar terminals in the ring are typically associated. For a breaker
and a half scheme, both busbars would normally be associated. For a ring
bus, all busbars would normally be associated. For a "straight" busbar
configuration, normally only the main terminal at the busbar would be associated.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CatalogAssetType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CatalogAssetType.stockItem
documentation: True if item is a stock item (default).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CatalogAssetType.estimatedUnitCost
documentation:
Estimated unit cost (or cost per unit length) of this type of asset. It
does not include labor to install, construct or configure it.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CatalogAssetType.quantity
documentation: The value, unit of measure, and multiplier for the quantity.
assets that may be used for planning, work or design purposes.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Channel

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Channel.isVirtual
documentation:
If true, the data is being calculated by an enterprise system rather than
metered directly.

A single path for the collection or reporting of register values over a
period of time. For example, a register which measures forward energy can
have two channels, one providing bulk quantity readings and the other providing
interval readings of a fixed interval size.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ClassificationCondition

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ClassificationCondition.duration
documentation: The duration of the of the condition in seconds

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ClassificationCondition.test
documentation: The test applied to the value.

A classification condition used to define preconditions that must be met
by a phenomena classification.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConnectivityNode

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConnectivityNode.ConnectivityNodeContainer
documentation: Container of this connectivity node.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConnectivityNode.Terminals
documentation: Terminals interconnected with zero impedance at a this connectivity node.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ConnectivityNode.TopologicalNode
documentation:
The topological node to which this connectivity node is assigned. May depend
on the current state of switches in the network.

Connectivity nodes are points where terminals of AC conducting equipment
are connected together with zero impedance.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CoordinateSystem

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CoordinateSystem.crsUrn
documentation:
A Uniform Resource Name (URN) for the coordinate reference system (crs)
used to define 'Location.PositionPoints'.
An example would be the European Petroleum Survey Group (EPSG) code for
a coordinate reference system, defined in URN under the Open Geospatial
Consortium (OGC) namespace as: urn:ogc:def:uom:EPSG::XXXX, where XXXX is
an EPSG code (a full list of codes can be found at the EPSG Registry web
site http://www.epsg-registry.org/). To define the coordinate system as
being WGS84 (latitude, longitude) using an EPSG OGC, this attribute would
be urn:ogc:def:uom:EPSG::4236.
A profile should limit this code to a set of allowed URNs agreed to by
all sending and receiving parties.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CoordinateSystem.Locations
documentation: All locations described with position points in this coordinate system.
Coordinate reference system.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Crew

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Crew.CrewMembers
documentation: All members of this crew.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Crew.CrewType
documentation: Type of this crew.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Crew.status
documentation: Status of this crew.
Group of people with specific skills, tools, and vehicles.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CrewType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CrewType.Crews
documentation: All crews of this type.

Custom description of the type of crew. This may be used to determine the
type of work the crew can be assigned to. Examples include repair, tree
trimming, switching, etc.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.curveStyle
documentation: The style or shape of the curve.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.xMultiplier
documentation: Multiplier for X-axis.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.xUnit
documentation: The X-axis units of measure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y1Multiplier
documentation: Multiplier for Y1-axis.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y1Unit
documentation: The Y1-axis units of measure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y2Multiplier
documentation: Multiplier for Y2-axis.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y2Unit
documentation: The Y2-axis units of measure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y3Multiplier
documentation: Multiplier for Y3-axis.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.y3Unit
documentation: The Y3-axis units of measure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Curve.CurveDatas
documentation: The point data values that define this curve.

A multi-purpose curve or functional relationship between an independent
variable (X-axis) and dependent (Y-axis) variables.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionAccount

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionAccount.emissionType
documentation:
The type of emission, for example sulfur dioxide (SO2). The y1AxisUnits
of the curve contains the unit of measure (e.g. kg) and the emissionType
is the type of emission (e.g. sulfer dioxide).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionAccount.emissionValueSource
documentation: The source of the emission value.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionAccount.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have one or more emission allowance accounts.

Accounts for tracking emissions usage and credits for thermal generating
units. A unit may have zero or more emission accounts, and will typically
have one for tracking usage and one for tracking credits.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionCurve.isNetGrossP
documentation: Flag is set to true when output is expressed in net active power.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionCurve.emissionContent
documentation: The emission content per quantity of fuel burned.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionCurve.emissionType
documentation:
The type of emission, which also gives the production rate measurement
unit. The y1AxisUnits of the curve contains the unit of measure (e.g. kg)
and the emissionType is the type of emission (e.g. sulfer dioxide).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EmissionCurve.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have one or more emission curves.

Relationship between the unit's emission rate in units of mass per hour
(Y-axis) and output active power (X-axis) for a given type of emission.
This curve applies when only one type of fuel is being burned.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.fuelAllocationEndDate
documentation: The end time and date of the fuel allocation schedule.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.fuelAllocationStartDate
documentation: The start time and date of the fuel allocation schedule.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.maxFuelAllocation
documentation:
The maximum amount fuel that is allocated for consumption for the scheduled
time period.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.minFuelAllocation
documentation:
The minimum amount fuel that is allocated for consumption for the scheduled
time period, e.g., based on a "take-or-pay" contract.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.fuelType
documentation: The type of fuel, which also indicates the corresponding measurement unit.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.FossilFuel
documentation: A fuel allocation schedule must have a fossil fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FuelAllocationSchedule.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have one or more fuel allocation schedules.

The amount of fuel of a given type which is allocated for consumption over
a specified period of time.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GenUnitOpCostCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GenUnitOpCostCurve.isNetGrossP
documentation: Flag is set to true when output is expressed in net active power.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GenUnitOpCostCurve.GeneratingUnit
documentation:
A generating unit may have one or more cost curves, depending upon fuel
mixture and fuel cost.

Relationship between unit operating cost (Y-axis) and unit output active
power (X-axis). The operating cost curve for thermal units is derived from
heat input and fuel costs. The operating cost curve for hydro units is
derived from water flow rates and equivalent water costs.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GrossToNetActivePowerCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GrossToNetActivePowerCurve.GeneratingUnit
documentation:
A generating unit may have a gross active power to net active power curve,
describing the losses and auxiliary power requirements of the unit.

Relationship between the generating unit's gross active power output on
the X-axis (measured at the terminals of the machine(s)) and the generating
unit's net active power output on the Y-axis (based on utility-defined
measurements at the power station). Station service loads, when modeled,
should be treated as non-conforming bus loads. There may be more than one
curve, depending on the auxiliary equipment that is in service.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.isNetGrossP
documentation: Flag is set to true when output is expressed in net active power.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.auxPowerMult
documentation: Power output - auxiliary power multiplier adjustment factor.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.auxPowerOffset
documentation: Power output - auxiliary power offset adjustment factor.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.heatInputEff
documentation: Heat input - efficiency multiplier adjustment factor.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.heatInputOffset
documentation: Heat input - offset adjustment factor.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatInputCurve.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have a heat input curve.

Relationship between unit heat input in energy per time for main fuel (Y1-axis)
and supplemental fuel (Y2-axis) versus unit output in active power (X-axis).
The quantity of main fuel used to sustain generation at this output level
is prorated for throttling between definition points. The quantity of supplemental
fuel used at this output level is fixed and not prorated.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatRateCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatRateCurve.isNetGrossP
documentation: Flag is set to true when output is expressed in net active power.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HeatRateCurve.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have a heat rate curve.

Relationship between unit heat rate per active power (Y-axis) and unit
output (X-axis). The heat input is from all fuels.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HydroGeneratingEfficiencyCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.HydroGeneratingEfficiencyCurve.HydroGeneratingUnit
documentation: A hydro generating unit has an efficiency curve.

Relationship between unit efficiency in percent and unit output active
power for a given net head in meters. The relationship between efficiency,
discharge, head, and power output is expressed as follows: E =KP/HQ
Where: (E=percentage) (P=active power) (H=height) (Q=volume/time unit)
(K=constant)
For example, a curve instance for a given net head could relate efficiency
(Y-axis) versus active power output (X-axis) or versus discharge on the
X-axis.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IncrementalHeatRateCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IncrementalHeatRateCurve.isNetGrossP
documentation: Flag is set to true when output is expressed in net active power.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IncrementalHeatRateCurve.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have an incremental heat rate curve.

Relationship between unit incremental heat rate in (delta energy/time)
per (delta active power) and unit output in active power. The IHR curve
represents the slope of the HeatInputCurve. Note that the "incremental
heat rate" and the "heat rate" have the same engineering units.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LevelVsVolumeCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LevelVsVolumeCurve.Reservoir
documentation: A reservoir may have a level versus volume relationship.

Relationship between reservoir volume and reservoir level. The volume is
at the y-axis and the reservoir level at the x-axis.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.PenstockLossCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.PenstockLossCurve.HydroGeneratingUnit
documentation: A hydro generating unit has a penstock loss curve.

Relationship between penstock head loss (in meters) and total discharge
through the penstock (in cubic meters per second). One or more turbines
may be connected to the same penstock.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ReactiveCapabilityCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ReactiveCapabilityCurve.coolantTemperature
documentation:
The machine's coolant temperature (e.g., ambient air or stator circulating
water).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ReactiveCapabilityCurve.hydrogenPressure
documentation: The hydrogen coolant pressure

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ReactiveCapabilityCurve.SynchronousMachines
documentation: Synchronous machines using this curve.

Reactive power rating envelope versus the synchronous machine's active
power, in both the generating and motoring modes. For each active power
value there is a corresponding high and low reactive power limit value.
Typically there will be a separate curve for each coolant condition, such
as hydrogen pressure. The Y1 axis values represent reactive minimum and
the Y2 axis values represent reactive maximum.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ShutdownCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ShutdownCurve.shutdownDate
documentation: The date and time of the most recent generating unit shutdown.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ShutdownCurve.shutdownCost
documentation: Fixed shutdown cost.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ShutdownCurve.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have a shutdown curve.

Relationship between the rate in gross active power/minute (Y-axis) at
which a unit should be shutdown and its present gross MW output (X-axis).

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartIgnFuelCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartIgnFuelCurve.ignitionFuelType
documentation: Type of ignition fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartIgnFuelCurve.StartupModel
documentation: The unit's startup model may have a startup ignition fuel curve.

The quantity of ignition fuel (Y-axis) used to restart and repay the auxiliary
power consumed versus the number of hours (X-axis) the unit was off line.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartMainFuelCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartMainFuelCurve.mainFuelType
documentation: Type of main fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartMainFuelCurve.StartupModel
documentation: The unit's startup model may have a startup main fuel curve.

The quantity of main fuel (Y-axis) used to restart and repay the auxiliary
power consumed versus the number of hours (X-axis) the unit was off line.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartRampCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartRampCurve.hotStandbyRamp
documentation: The startup ramp rate in gross for a unit that is on hot standby.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.StartRampCurve.StartupModel
documentation: The unit's startup model may have a startup ramp curve.

Rate in gross active power/minute (Y-axis) at which a unit can be loaded
versus the number of hours (X-axis) the unit was off line.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TailbayLossCurve

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TailbayLossCurve.HydroGeneratingUnit
documentation: A hydro generating unit has a tailbay loss curve.

Relationship between tailbay head loss hight (y-axis) and the total discharge
into the power station's tailbay volume per time unit (x-axis) . There
could be more than one curve depending on the level of the tailbay reservoir
or river level.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TargetLevelSchedule

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TargetLevelSchedule.highLevelLimit
documentation: High target level limit, above which the reservoir operation will be penalized.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TargetLevelSchedule.lowLevelLimit
documentation: Low target level limit, below which the reservoir operation will be penalized.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.TargetLevelSchedule.Reservoir
documentation: A reservoir may have a water level target schedule.

Reservoir water level targets from advanced studies or "rule curves". Typically
in one hour increments for up to 10 days.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DayType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DayType.SeasonDayTypeSchedules
documentation: Schedules that use this DayType.

Group of similar days. For example it could be used to represent weekdays,
weekend, or holidays.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram.type
documentation:
Type of demand response program; examples are CPP (critical-peak pricing),
RTP (real-time pricing), DLC (direct load control), DBP (demand bidding
program), BIP (base interruptible program). Note that possible types change
a lot and it would be impossible to enumerate them all.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram.CustomerAgreements
documentation:
All customer agreements through which the customer is enrolled in this
demand response program.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram.EndDeviceGroups
documentation: All groups of end devices enrolled in this demand response program.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram.UsagePointGroups
documentation: All usage point groups enrolled in this demand response program.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.DemandResponseProgram.validityInterval
documentation: Interval within which the program is valid.
Demand response program.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.authorName
documentation: Name of the author of this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.comment
documentation: Free text comment.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.createdDateTime
documentation: Date and time that this document was created.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.lastModifiedDateTime
documentation:
Date and time this document was last modified. Documents may potentially
be modified many times during their lifetime.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.revisionNumber
documentation: Revision number for this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.subject
documentation: Document subject.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.title
documentation: Document title.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.type
documentation:
Utility-specific classification of this document, according to its corporate
standards, practices, and existing IT systems (e.g., for management of
assets, maintenance, work, outage, customers, etc.).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.Approver
documentation: Approver of this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.Author
documentation: Author of this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.ConfigurationEvents
documentation: All configuration events created for this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.docStatus
documentation:
Status of this document. For status of subject matter this document represents
(e.g., Agreement, Work), use 'status' attribute.
Example values for 'docStatus.status' are draft, approved, cancelled, etc.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.Editor
documentation: Editor of this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.electronicAddress
documentation: Electronic address.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.Issuer
documentation: Issuer of this document.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Document.status
documentation:
Status of subject matter (e.g., Agreement, Work) this document represents.
For status of the document itself, use 'docStatus' attribute.

Parent class for different groupings of information collected and managed
as a part of a business process. It will frequently contain references
to other objects, such as assets, people and power system resources.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Analytic

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Analytic.bestValue
documentation: Value that indicates best possible numeric value.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Analytic.worstValue
documentation: Value that indicates worst possible numeric value.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Analytic.kind
documentation: Kind of analytic this analytic is.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Analytic.scaleKind
documentation: The scoring scale kind.

An algorithm or calculation for making an assessment about an asset or
asset grouping for lifecycle decision making.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetGroup

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AssetGroup.kind
documentation: Kind of asset group this asset group is.

A grouping of assets created for a purpose such as fleet analytics, inventory
or compliance management.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount.billingCycle
documentation:
Cycle day on which the associated customer account will normally be billed,
used to determine when to produce the billing.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount.budgetBill
documentation: Budget bill code.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount.lastBillAmount
documentation:
The last amount that will be billed to the customer prior to shut off of
the account.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount.Customer
documentation: Customer owning this account.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAccount.CustomerAgreements
documentation: All agreements for this customer account.

Assignment of a group of products and services purchased by the customer
through a customer agreement, used as a mechanism for customer billing
and payment. It contains common information from the various types of customer
agreements to create billings (invoices) for a customer and receive payment.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.isPrePay
documentation: If true, the customer is a pre-pay customer for the specified service.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.loadMgmt
documentation: Load management code.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.shutOffDateTime
documentation: Final date and time the service will be billed to the previous customer.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.Customer
documentation: Customer for this agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.CustomerAccount
documentation: Customer account owning this agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.DemandResponsePrograms
documentation:
All demand response programs the customer is enrolled in through this customer
agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.MeterReadings
documentation:
(could be deprecated in the future) All meter readings for this customer
agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.PricingStructures
documentation: All pricing structures applicable to this customer agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.ServiceCategory
documentation: Service category for this agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.ServiceLocations
documentation: All service locations regulated by this customer agreement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.CustomerAgreement.UsagePoints
documentation: All service delivery points regulated by this customer agreement.

Agreement between the customer and the service supplier to pay for service
at a specific service location. It records certain billing information
about the type of service provided at the service location and is used
during charge creation to determine the type of service.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.PricingStructure
documentation:
Grouping of pricing components and prices used in the creation of customer
charges and the eligibility criteria under which these terms may be offered
to a customer. The reasons for grouping include state, customer classification,
site characteristics, classification (i.e. fee price structure, deposit
price structure, electric service price structure, etc.) and accounting
requirements.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.instruction
documentation: Textual description of this procedure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.sequenceNumber
documentation: Sequence number in a sequence of procedures being performed.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.kind
documentation: Kind of procedure.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.Assets
documentation: All assets to which this procedure applies.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.Measurements
documentation: Document containing this measurement.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Procedure.ProcedureDataSets
documentation: All data sets captured by this procedure.
Documented procedure for various types of work or work tasks on assets.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ProcedureDataSet

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ProcedureDataSet.completedDateTime
documentation: Date and time procedure was completed.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ProcedureDataSet.Asset
documentation: Asset to which this procedure data set applies.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ProcedureDataSet.Procedure
documentation: Procedure capturing this data set.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.ProcedureDataSet.Properties
documentation:
UserAttributes used to specify further properties of this procedure data
set. Use 'name' to specify what kind of property it is, and 'value.value'
attribute for the actual value.

A data set recorded each time a procedure is executed. Observed results
are captured in associated measurement values and/or values for properties
relevant to the type of procedure performed.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InspectionDataSet

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.InspectionDataSet.locationCondition
documentation: Description of the conditions of the location where the asset resides.
Documents the result of one inspection, for a given attribute of an asset.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.drProgramLevel
documentation:
Level of a demand response program request, where 0=emergency. Note: Attribute
is not defined on DemandResponseProgram as it is not its inherent property
(it serves to control it).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.drProgramMandatory
documentation:
Whether a demand response program request is mandatory. Note: Attribute
is not defined on DemandResponseProgram as it is not its inherent property
(it serves to control it).

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.issuerID
documentation: Unique identifier of the business entity originating an end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.issuerTrackingID
documentation:
Identifier assigned by the initiator (e.g. retail electric provider) of
an end device control action to uniquely identify the demand response event,
text message, or other subject of the control action. Can be used when
cancelling an event or text message request or to identify the originating
event or text message in a consequential end device event.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.reason
documentation:
Reason for the control action that allows to determine how to continue
processing. For example, disconnect meter command may require different
processing by the receiving system if it has been issued for a network-related
reason (protection) or for a payment-related reason.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.EndDeviceAction
documentation: End device action issued by this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.EndDeviceControlType
documentation: Type of this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.EndDeviceGroups
documentation: All end device groups receiving commands from this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.EndDevices
documentation: All end devices receiving commands from this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.priceSignal
documentation: (if applicable) Price signal used as parameter for this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.primaryDeviceTiming
documentation:
Timing for the control actions performed on the device identified in the
end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.scheduledInterval
documentation:
(if control has scheduled duration) Date and time interval the control
has been scheduled to execute within.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.secondaryDeviceTiming
documentation:
Timing for the control actions performed by devices that are responding
to event related information sent to the primary device indicated in the
end device control. For example, load control actions performed by a PAN
device in response to demand response event information sent to a PAN gateway
server.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.UsagePointGroups
documentation: All usage point groups receiving commands from this end device control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControl.UsagePoints
documentation: All usage points receiving commands from this end device control.

Instructs an end device (or an end device group) to perform a specified
action.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType.domain
documentation: High-level nature of the control.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType.eventOrAction
documentation:
The most specific part of this control type. It is mainly in the form of
a verb that gives action to the control that just occurred.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType.subDomain
documentation:
More specific nature of the control, as a further sub-categorisation of
'domain'.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType.type
documentation:
Type of physical device from which the control was created. A value of
zero (0) can be used when the source is unknown.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceControlType.EndDeviceControls
documentation: All end device controls of this type.

Detailed description for a control produced by an end device. Values in
attributes allow for creation of recommended codes to be used for identifying
end device controls as follows: <type>.<domain>.<subDomain>.<eventOrAction>.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType.domain
documentation:
High-level nature of the event. By properly classifying events by a small
set of domain codes, a system can more easily run reports based on the
types of events that have occurred or been received.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType.eventOrAction
documentation:
The most specific part of this event type. It is mainly in the form of
a verb that gives action to the event that just occurred.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType.subDomain
documentation: More specific nature of the event, as a further sub-categorisation of 'domain'.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType.type
documentation:
Type of physical device from which the event was created. A value of zero
(0) can be used when the source is unknown.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceEventType.EndDeviceEvents
documentation: All end device events of this type.

Detailed description for an event produced by an end device. Values in
attributes allow for creation of recommended codes to be used for identifying
end device events as follows: <type>.<domain>.<subDomain>.<eventOrAction>.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceGroup

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceGroup.type
documentation: Type of this group.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceGroup.DemandResponsePrograms
documentation: All demand response programs this group of end devices is enrolled in.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceGroup.EndDeviceControls
documentation: All end device controls sending commands to this end device group.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EndDeviceGroup.EndDevices
documentation: All end devices this end device group refers to.

Abstraction for management of group communications within a two-way AMR
system or the data for a group of related end devices. Commands can be
issued to all of the end devices that belong to the group using a defined
group address and the underlying AMR communication infrastructure. A DERGroup
and a PANDeviceGroup is an EndDeviceGroup.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnergyArea
documentation:
Describes an area having energy production or consumption. Specializations
are intended to support the load allocation function as typically required
in energy management systems or planning studies to allocate hypothesized
load levels to individual load points for power flow analysis. Often the
energy area can be linked to both measured and forecast load levels.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LoadArea

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LoadArea.SubLoadAreas
documentation: The SubLoadAreas in the LoadArea.

The class is the root or first level in a hierarchical structure for grouping
of loads for the purpose of load flow load scaling.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SubLoadArea

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SubLoadArea.LoadArea
documentation: The LoadArea where the SubLoadArea belongs.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SubLoadArea.LoadGroups
documentation: The Loadgroups in the SubLoadArea.

The class is the second level in a hierarchical structure for grouping
of loads for the purpose of load flow load scaling.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalInformation

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalInformation.created
documentation: The timestamp of when the forecast was created

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalInformation.EnvironmentalAnalog
documentation: Environmental analog associated with this observation or forecast.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalInformation.EnvironmentalDataProvider
documentation: Environmental data provider supplying this environmental information.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalInformation.EnvironmentalStringMeasurement
documentation: Environmental string measurement associated with this forecast or observation.

Abstract class (with concrete child classes of Observation and Forecast)
that groups phenomenon and/or environmental value sets.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalPhenomenon

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalPhenomenon.EnvironmentalLocationKind
documentation: Location of relevance to this environmental phenomenon.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalPhenomenon.NamedPhenomenon
documentation: The identified phenomenon to which this environmental phenomenon is associated.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EnvironmentalPhenomenon.timeInterval
documentation: The timestamp of the phenomenon as a single point or time interval.

The actual or forecast occurrence of an environmental phenomenon at a specific
point in time (or during a specific time interval) that may have both a
center and area/line location. Named events (like Hurricane Andrew or the
ash cloud associated with the St. Helens eruption) are intended to be modeled
using an instance of IdentifiedPhenomenon (where the event name is recorded)
related with one or more EnvironmentalPhenomenon instances in one or more
Observations or Forecasts) which describe the event over time.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.occurredDateTime
documentation: The date and time at which the fault occurred.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.stopDateTime
documentation:
Time when the fault is repaired. If not specified, the fault is temporary
and will clear itself as soon as it's deenergized.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.kind
documentation: The kind of phase fault.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.phases
documentation:
The phases participating in the fault. The fault connections into these
phases are further specified by the type of fault.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.FaultCauseTypes
documentation: All types of fault cause.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.FaultyEquipment
documentation: Equipment carrying this fault.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Fault.impedance
documentation: Fault impedance. Its usage is described by 'kind'.

Abnormal condition causing current flow through conducting equipment, such
as caused by equipment failure or short circuits from objects not typically
modeled (for example, a tree falling on a line).

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EquipmentFault

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.EquipmentFault.Terminal
documentation: The terminal connecting to the bus to which the fault is applied.

A fault applied at the terminal, external to the equipment. This class
is not used to specify faults internal to the equipment.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LineFault

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LineFault.lengthFromTerminal1
documentation:
The length to the place where the fault is located starting from terminal
with sequence number 1 of the faulted line segment.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.LineFault.ACLineSegment
documentation: The line segment of this line fault.
A fault that occurs on an AC line segment at some point along the length.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FaultCauseType

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FaultCauseType.Faults
documentation: All faults with this cause type.
Type of cause of the fault.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FieldDispatchHistory
documentation: The history of field dispatch statuses for this work.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FinancialInfo
documentation:
Various current financial properties associated with a particular asset.
Historical properties may be determined by ActivityRecords associated with
the asset.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelHeatContent
documentation: The amount of heat per weight (or volume) of the given type of fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fossilFuelType
documentation: The type of fossil fuel, such as coal, oil, or gas.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelCost
documentation: The cost in terms of heat value for the given type of fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelDispatchCost
documentation:
The cost of fuel used for economic dispatching which includes: fuel cost,
transportation cost, and incremental maintenance cost.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelEffFactor
documentation:
The efficiency factor for the fuel (per unit) in terms of the effective
energy absorbed.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelHandlingCost
documentation: Handling and processing cost associated with this fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelMixture
documentation:
Relative amount of the given type of fuel, when multiple fuels are being
consumed.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.fuelSulfur
documentation: The fuel's fraction of pollution credit per unit of heat content.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.highBreakpointP
documentation:
The active power output level of the unit at which the given type of fuel
is switched on. This fuel (e.g., oil) is sometimes used to supplement the
base fuel (e.g., coal) at high active power output levels.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.lowBreakpointP
documentation:
The active power output level of the unit at which the given type of fuel
is switched off. This fuel (e.g., oil) is sometimes used to stabilize the
base fuel (e.g., coal) at low active power output levels.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.FuelAllocationSchedules
documentation: A fuel allocation schedule must have a fossil fuel.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.FossilFuel.ThermalGeneratingUnit
documentation: A thermal generating unit may have one or more fossil fuels.

The fossil fuel consumed by the non-nuclear thermal generating unit. For
example, coal, oil, gas, etc. This a the specific fuels that the generating
unit can consume.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GeographicalRegion

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.GeographicalRegion.Regions
documentation: All sub-geograhpical regions within this geographical region.
A geographical region of a power system network model.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.House
documentation:
In GridLAB-D, a single-family residence with building envelope represented
by the equivalent thermal parameter (ETP) model, heating, ventilating and
air conditioning (HVAC), other appliances, lights and plug loads. In power
flow, these house loads aggregate into ZIP loads. These house parameters
are the minimal set required to consistently initialize or repeat a GridLAB-D
simulation.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.IOPoint
documentation:
The class describe a measurement or control value. The purpose is to enable
having attributes and associations common for measurement and control.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.controlType
documentation:
Specifies the type of Control, e.g. BreakerOn/Off, GeneratorVoltageSetPoint,
TieLineFlow etc. The ControlType.name shall be unique among all specified
types and describe the type.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.operationInProgress
documentation:
Indicates that a client is currently sending control commands that has
not completed.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.timeStamp
documentation: The last time a control output was sent.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.unitMultiplier
documentation: The unit multiplier of the controlled quantity.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.unitSymbol
documentation: The unit of measure of the controlled quantity.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Control.PowerSystemResource
documentation: Regulating device governed by this control output.

Control is used for supervisory/device control. It represents control outputs
that are used to change the state in a process, e.g. close or open breaker,
a set point value or a raise lower command.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AccumulatorReset

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AccumulatorReset.AccumulatorValue
documentation: The accumulator value that is reset by the command.
This command reset the counter value to zero.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalogControl

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalogControl.maxValue
documentation:
Normal value range maximum for any of the Control.value. Used for scaling,
e.g. in bar graphs.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalogControl.minValue
documentation:
Normal value range minimum for any of the Control.value. Used for scaling,
e.g. in bar graphs.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.AnalogControl.AnalogValue
documentation: The MeasurementValue that is controlled.
An analog control used for supervisory control.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RaiseLowerCommand

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.RaiseLowerCommand.ValueAliasSet
documentation: The ValueAliasSet used for translation of a Control value to a name.

An analog control that increase or decrease a set point value with pulses.
Unless otherwise specified, one pulse moves the set point by one.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SetPoint

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SetPoint.normalValue
documentation: Normal value for Control.value e.g. used for percentage scaling.

class_variables.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.SetPoint.value
documentation: The value representing the actuator output.
An analog control that issue a set point value.

classes.name: cimgraph.data_profile.rc4_2021.rc4_2021.Command
